revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Expand Japanese|蜂田神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hachita Shrine | native_name = 蜂田神社 | image = Osaka Sakai Hachita shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hachita Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.528108|135.479119}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|fr|Ama-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|it|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋命|mni|ꯑꯃꯦ-ꯅꯣ-ꯀꯣꯌꯅꯦ|pt|Ame-no-Koyane|ru|Амэ-но коянэ-но микото|simple|Ame-no-Koyane|zh|天兒屋命|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hachita Shrine'''|蜂田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Hoe offering|lt=Shrines receiving Hoe offering|qid=Q135009205|1=Shrines receiving Hoe offering}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11417778|ltq=Q11417778|qid=Q11417778|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izumi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 10 ** P155: {{ill|Tonoki Shrine|lt=Tonoki Shrine|ja|等乃伎神社|qid=Q55532347|1=Tonoki Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11658473|ltq=Q11658473|qid=Q11658473|1=Suearata Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Sakai|lt=Sakai|ar|ساكاي|arz|ساكاى (تجمع سكان فى محافظه اوساكا)|ban|Sakai, Osaka|be|Сакаі (Осака)|bg|Сакаи|br|Sakai|ca|Sakai (Osaka)|ceb|Sakai Shi|ce|Сакаи (Осака)|cs|Sakai (Ósaka)|cy|Sakai|da|Sakai|de|Sakai|en|Sakai|envoyage|Sakai (Osaka)|eo|Sakaj|es|Sakai (Osaka)|et|Sakai|eu|Sakai (Osaka)|fa|ساکای، اوساکا|fi|Sakai|fr|Sakai|ga|Sakai|gl|Sakai, Osaka|he|סאקאי|hu|Szakai (Oszaka)|hy|Սակաի|id|Sakai, Osaka|it|Sakai (Osaka)|ja|堺市|javoyage|堺市|ki|Sakai|ko|사카이시 (오사카부)|la|Sacaium|lt|Sakajus|mg|Sakai|mn|Сакай|ms|Sakai|nl|Sakai (Osaka)|no|Sakai|os|Сакаи (Осакæ)|pl|Sakai (Osaka)|plvoyage|Sakai|pt|Sakai (Osaka)|ro|Sakai, Osaka|ru|Сакаи (Осака)|sah|Сакаи|sco|Sakai|sh|Sakai, Osaka|simple|Sakai, Osaka|sk|Sakai (Osaka)|sr|Сакај|su|Sakai, Osaka|sv|Sakai|tg|Сакаи|th|ซาไก (เมือง)|tl|Sakai, Osaka|tr|Sakai|tt|Сакаи (Осака)|tum|Sakai|uk|Сакай (Осака)|ur|ساکائی، اوساکا|uz|Sakai|vi|Sakai|war|Sakai|wuu|堺市|zh_classical|堺市|zh_min_nan|Sakai-chhī (Tāi-pán)|zh_yue|堺市|zh|堺市|zhvoyage|堺市|qid=Q193428|1=Sakai}} * {{ill|Izumi Province|lt=Izumi Province|ca|Província d'Izumi|ckb|پارێزگای ئیزومی|cs|Provincie Izumi|de|Provinz Izumi|en|Izumi Province|es|Provincia de Izumi|fa|ولایت ایزومی|fr|Province d'Izumi|gl|Provincia de (provincia)|sr|Провинција Изуми|tr|Izumi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ідзумі|zh_min_nan|Izumi-kok|zh_yue|和泉國|zh|和泉國|qid=Q1047117|1=Izumi Province}} * {{ill|Q3270651|ltq=Q3270651|qid=Q3270651|1=Ōtori district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.528108|135.479119}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Osaka Sakai Hachita shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q2564508|ltq=Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180977 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はちたじんじゃ == Instagram username (P2003) == * hachita_jinjya == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3120105000962 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府堺市中区八田寺町524', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:蜂田神社]] {{wikidata link|Q22119986}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hachita Shrine |画像 = [[File:Osaka Sakai Hachita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakai|Q193428|qid=Q193428|1=Sakai}}{{ill|lt=Naka-ku (Sakai)|Q1042487|qid=Q1042487|lt=Naka-ku|1=Naka-ku, Sakai}}Hattadera-chō 524 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |別名 = Suzu-no-Miya |札所等 = |例祭 = First Saturday of October |神事 = Bell-divination rite |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Hachita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Hachita Shrine''' (はちたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Hattadera-chō, {{ill|lt=Naka-ku (Sakai)|Q1042487|qid=Q1042487|lt=Naka-ku|1=Naka-ku, Sakai}}, {{ill|lt=Sakai|Q193428|qid=Q193428|1=Sakai}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small), and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. It is also called '''Suzu-no-Miya'''. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity - {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} * Associated deities - {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}, {{ill|lt=Kanayamahiko-no-Kami|Q4387856|qid=Q4387856|lt=Kanayamahiko-no-Mikoto|1=Kanayama-hiko and Kanayama-hime}}, {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} === History === The exact founding year is unknown, but it is said that the Hachita no Muraji clan who lived in this area worshiped their ancestor {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} as deity. A tale says the Hachita no Muraji made 12 {{ill|lt=earthen bells|Q9210104|qid=Q9210104|lt=fired-clay bells|1=dorei}} and offered them each spring, divining that year's fortune by their sound quality; from this it was also called Suzu-no-Miya[https://www.sakai-tcb.or.jp/spot/detail/130 Sakai Tourism Guide Hachita Shrine]. It is also a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} of {{ill|lt=Ōtori District|Q3270651|qid=Q3270651|1=Ōtori district}} in {{ill|lt=Izumi Province|Q1047117|qid=Q1047117|1=Izumi Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Before the {{ill|lt=Eiroku|Q1143341|qid=Q1143341|1=Eiroku}} era ({{ill|lt=1558|Q6601|qid=Q6601|1=1558}}-{{ill|lt=1570|Q6659|qid=Q6659|1=1570}}), it stood about one chō west at the mountain foot, but tradition says it moved to the present site due to the 1568 (Eiroku 11) battle over Iehara Castle between the {{ill|lt=Miyoshi Triumvirate|Q8192653|qid=Q8192653|1=Miyoshi Trio}} and {{ill|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide|Q1143038|qid=Q1143038|1=Matsunaga Hisahide}}[origin board in the precinct]. In 'Senshū-shi' published in {{ill|lt=Genroku|Q1325001|qid=Q1325001|1=Genroku}} 13 ({{ill|lt=1700|Q6813|qid=Q6813|1=1700}}), Ishibashi Naoyuki records Hachita Shrine as being in {{ill|lt=Hirai Village (Osaka)|Q11368908|qid=Q11368908|lt=Hirai Village|1=Kuze}} (today Hirai, Naka-ku, Sakai), with Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto as ancestor deity of Hachita no Muraji. In early modern times, Seirin-ji existed as its {{ill|lt=jingū-ji|Q1074971|qid=Q1074971|1=Jingū-ji}}, but in the {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} era it was abolished due to {{ill|lt=shinbutsu bunri|Q1970535|qid=Q1970535|1=Shinbutsu bunri}}. The shrine was ranked {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. In {{ill|lt=1910|Q2075|qid=Q2075|1=1910}} (Meiji 43), it merged six nearby village shrines and two unranked shrines. === Precinct === * Honden * Haiden * Shrine office * Suzu-zuka mound * {{ill|lt=Ise Jingū|Q687168|qid=Q687168|1=Ise Grand Shrine}} distant worship site === Sessha and massha === * Mitsumine {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inari-sha|1=UNKNOWN}} === Wind-bell festival === Held from July 1 to August 31. About 1,300 wind bells, including Edo, Kawachi, and Nambu styles, ring clear sounds through the precincts[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/naka/miryoku/nakaku_machikado/hachita-jinja.html Sakai City website: Wind-bell festival at Hachita Shrine (Suzu-no-Miya)]. === Location === * 524 Hattadera-chō, Naka-ku, Sakai, Osaka === Access === * From {{ill|lt=Fukai Station|Q5507572|qid=Q5507572|1=Fukai Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Nankai Senboku Line|Q2758012|qid=Q2758012|1=Semboku Line}}, take {{ill|lt=Nankai Bus|Q11408154|qid=Q11408154|1=Nankai Bus}} bound for Tsukuno Station and get off at "Suzu-no-Miya Danchi Higashiguchi," then about 5 minutes on foot === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Notelist2}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of shrines|Q2517815|qid=Q2517815|1=List of Shinto shrines in Japan}} === External links === * {{Instagram|hachita_jinjya}} * [https://www.osaka-jinjacho.jp/funai_jinja/dai10shibu/sakai-city/10017hachitajinja.html Hachita Shrine - Osaka Prefectural Shrine Association] * [http://www.sakai-tcb.or.jp/spot/spot.php?id=130 Spot detail: Hachita Shrine | Sakai Tourism Guide] {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=大阪府}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hachita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hachita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumi Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sakai, Osaka]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Sakai City]] [[Category:Son-sha in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:堺市中区の建築物]]
